skills.name: agent-reach
skills.description: 统一多平台内容读取与搜索，支持 Twitter/X、Reddit、YouTube、GitHub、B站、小红书等9个平台
skills.description_en: Unified multi-platform content reader and searcher supporting Twitter/X, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu, RSS, and any web page via single CLI

skills.name: viral-writer
skills.description: 自媒体爆款内容创作，基于11个洞见维度，支持微信公众号、小红书、抖音三种平台风格
skills.description_en: Viral content creation for WeChat, XiaoHongShu, and TikTok using 11 content insight dimensions including emotion curves, hooks, and persuasion strategies

skills.name: deep-research
skills.description: 13智能体学术深度研究系统，支持全量、快速、苏格拉底对话、文献综述、事实核查、系统性综述等7种模式
skills.description_en: Universal 13-agent academic deep research pipeline with 7 modes: full, quick, socratic, lit-review, fact-check, review, and PRISMA systematic review with meta-analysis

skills.name: academic-paper
skills.description: 12智能体学术论文写作系统，支持 IMRaD、文献综述、理论、案例研究等结构，APA 7.0/MLA/IEEE/Chicago 等格式
skills.description_en: 12-agent academic paper writing pipeline supporting IMRaD, literature review, theoretical, case study, and conference paper structures with LaTeX/DOCX/PDF output

skills.name: academic-paper-reviewer
skills.description: 5视角学术论文同行评审，模拟主编+3位审稿人+魔鬼代言人对论文进行多维评估
skills.description_en: Multi-perspective academic paper review simulating 5 independent reviewers (EIC, 3 peer reviewers, Devil's Advocate) with field-specific expertise

skills.name: academic-pipeline
skills.description: 全流程学术研究编排器：研究→写作→完整性检查→同行评审→修订→再审稿→终稿，9阶段端到端工作流
skills.description_en: Full academic research pipeline orchestrator: research → write → integrity check → review → revise → re-review → finalize in a 9-stage automated workflow

skills.name: artifacts-builder
skills.description: 构建复杂多组件 claude.ai HTML Artifact，基于 React + TypeScript + shadcn/ui 技术栈，一键打包为单文件 HTML
skills.description_en: Build elaborate multi-component claude.ai HTML artifacts using React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui; bundle everything into a single self-contained HTML file

skills.name: mcp-builder
skills.description: 构建高质量 MCP (Model Context Protocol) 服务器，支持 Python (FastMCP) 和 Node/TypeScript 实现
skills.description_en: Guide for creating high-quality MCP servers that enable LLMs to interact with external services, covering design principles, implementation, and testing in Python or TypeScript

skills.name: skill-creator
skills.description: 创建和更新 Claude Skill 的权威指南，涵盖 Skill 结构、编写最佳实践和工具集成
skills.description_en: Guide for creating effective Claude skills with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations; covers skill anatomy, frontmatter, and bundled resources

skills.name: changelog-generator
skills.description: 从 git 提交历史自动生成面向用户的 Changelog，将技术性提交转化为清晰的版本发布说明
skills.description_en: Automatically generate user-facing changelogs from git commit history, categorizing and translating technical commits into customer-friendly release notes

skills.name: competitive-ads-extractor
skills.description: 从 Facebook、LinkedIn 等广告库提取并分析竞品广告，识别有效的信息传达策略和创意模式
skills.description_en: Extract and analyze competitors' ads from ad libraries (Facebook, LinkedIn, etc.) to understand messaging, pain points, and creative patterns that are working

skills.name: canvas-design
skills.description: 创作美术馆级视觉设计作品，先生成设计哲学再表达为 PNG/PDF 艺术品，高度视觉化输出
skills.description_en: Create museum-quality visual art by first generating a design philosophy then expressing it visually as .png or .pdf files; 90% visual, 10% essential text

skills.name: article-illustrator
skills.description: 分析文章结构、识别配图位置，使用「类型 × 风格」两维度方法为文章生成一致性插图
skills.description_en: Analyze article structure, identify illustration positions, and generate images with consistent Type × Style (infographic/scene × minimal/watercolor) two-dimension approach

skills.name: infographic-generator
skills.description: 专业信息图生成器，21种布局类型 × 20种视觉风格，生成适合发布的高质量信息图
skills.description_en: Professional infographic generator with 21 layout types and 20 visual styles; analyzes content and recommends optimal layout×style combinations for publication-ready output

skills.name: post-to-wechat
skills.description: 通过 API 或 Chrome CDP 发布内容到微信公众号，支持文章和图文两种形式
skills.description_en: Post content to WeChat Official Account via API or Chrome CDP; supports article posting with HTML/Markdown and image-text posting with multiple images

skills.name: post-to-x
skills.description: 通过真实 Chrome CDP 自动发布内容到 X (Twitter)，支持普通推文和 X Articles 长文
skills.description_en: Post content and articles to X (Twitter) using real Chrome CDP automation, supporting regular posts with media and X Articles long-form Markdown

skills.name: ai-humanizer
skills.description: 检测并去除 AI 写作痕迹，使用24种模式检测器和500+AI词汇列表，将文本改写为自然的人类写作风格
skills.description_en: Detect and remove AI writing patterns using 24 pattern detectors, 500+ AI vocabulary terms, and statistical analysis; rewrite text to sound natural and human

skills.name: agent-team-orchestration
skills.description: 多智能体团队编排，定义角色、任务生命周期、交接协议和质量门禁，支持2+智能体协作
skills.description_en: Production playbook for running multi-agent teams with defined roles, task lifecycle (inbox→spec→build→review→done), handoff protocols, and quality gates

skills.name: brainstorming
skills.description: 将创意想法转化为完整设计方案，通过苏格拉底对话澄清需求，在实施前必须完成设计评审
skills.description_en: Turn ideas into fully-formed designs through collaborative dialogue; explores context, asks clarifying questions, proposes approaches, and requires design approval before any implementation

skills.name: copywriting
skills.description: 专业营销文案写作，涵盖主页、落地页、定价页、功能页等，以转化为核心目标
skills.description_en: Expert conversion copywriting for homepages, landing pages, pricing pages, and feature pages; gathers audience, product, and context before writing

skills.name: content-strategy
skills.description: 内容策略规划，帮助确定内容选题、主题集群和发布计划，以流量和潜在客户获取为目标
skills.description_en: Plan content strategies that drive traffic, build authority, and generate leads; identifies topic clusters, content gaps, and publication priorities

skills.name: code-review
skills.description: 系统性代码评审检查单，覆盖安全性、性能、可维护性、正确性和测试五个维度，含严重性分级
skills.description_en: Systematic code review covering security, performance, maintainability, correctness, and testing with severity levels and structured feedback guidance

skills.name: agent-memory
skills.description: AI 智能体跨会话持久化记忆系统，支持事实存储、经验学习、实体追踪，使用本地 SQLite 数据库
skills.description_en: Persistent memory system for AI agents to remember facts, learn from experience, and track entities across sessions using a local SQLite database

skills.name: market-research
skills.description: 市场调研、竞品分析、投资者尽调，生成带来源引用的决策导向研究报告
skills.description_en: Conduct market research, competitive analysis, and investor due diligence with source attribution; produces decision-oriented reports with market sizing and competitor comparisons

skills.name: tdd-workflow
skills.description: 测试驱动开发工作流，强制先写测试再实现，要求 80%+ 覆盖率，包含单元、集成、E2E 测试
skills.description_en: Enforce test-driven development with 80%+ coverage including unit, integration, and E2E tests; tests written before code for all new features and bug fixes

skills.name: content-engine
skills.description: 平台原生内容创作引擎，支持 X、LinkedIn、TikTok、YouTube、Newsletter，将单一素材适配多平台
skills.description_en: Create platform-native content for X, LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, and newsletters; adapts one source asset into distinct formats for each platform
